characters.appearance: Young female, fair complexion, wavy red hair, large green eyes. Stylized 3D animated appearance.
characters.wardrobe: White top and gold crescent moon earrings.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, fair complexion, dark hair, and a short beard.
characters.wardrobe: Black t-shirt, clear plastic shower cap, and white wireless earbuds.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Where do you live? [Where do you live?]

Character B says: I am living in Delhi. [I am living in Delhi.]

Character A says: Grammatically theek hai, but native speakers usually say, I live in Delhi. [Grammatically it's okay, but native speakers usually say, I live in Delhi.]

Character B says: I live in Delhi. [I live in Delhi.]

Character A says: Great! What is your age? [Great! What is your age?]

Character B says: My age is twenty-four years. [My age is twenty-four years.]

Character A says: Better to say, I am twenty-four years old. [Better to say, I am twenty-four years old.]

Character B says: I am twenty-four years old. [I am twenty-four years old.]

Character A says: Perfect. What do you do? [Perfect. What do you do?]

Character B says: I am doing job in bank. [I am doing job in bank.]

Character A says: More naturally, you can say, I work at a bank. [More naturally, you can say, I work at a bank.]

Character B says: I work at a bank. [I work at a bank.]

Character A says: Well done! [Well done!]

Character B says: Thank you. Par aap kaun ho? [Thank you. But who are you?]

Character A says: Main Supernova ki AI tutor hoon. Hum roz aise hi baat karke English practice kar sakte hain. [I am Supernova's AI tutor. We can practice English by talking like this every day.]

Character B says: Par meri English bahut weak hai. Mujhe bolne mein darr lagta hai. [But my English is very weak. I feel scared to speak.]

Character A says: Tension mat lo. Main aapko Hindi mein samjhaungi, aur hum dheere dheere English bolna seekhenge. [Don't worry. I will explain to you in Hindi, and we will slowly learn to speak English.]

Character B says: Aapko Hindi aati hai? [You know Hindi?]

Character A says: Bilkul, main ek AI hoon. [Of course, I am an AI.]

Character B says: Sahi hai, main abhi app download karta hoon. [That's great, I am going to download this app right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by demonstrating real-time AI correction of common English mistakes made by Indian speakers.
- Establishes the AI's ability to converse and teach in Hindi, removing the intimidation factor for beginners.
- Ends with a clear call to action as the user feels encouraged and decides to download the app.

- Displays the brand logo and app store badges.
- Provides a clear final visual call to action for downloading the app.
